results.title: Step by Step - How to Build a House
results.reason: High clarity and logical sequencing make this the best general construction overview, though it lacks specific African context.
summary: Learn the order of building a new home
Understand how the foundation and frame are made
See how pipes and wires are put inside
Discover how to finish the walls and floors

results.title: 12 Steps of Construction
results.reason: A very accessible 12-step breakdown that is perfect for absolute beginners to understand the lifecycle of a project.
summary: Follow the main stages of a building project
Learn how to prepare the ground for building
Understand how the skeleton of a house works
See the final steps to complete a structure

results.title: How to Read Construction Drawings | Beginners Guide to Blueprint Reading | Architectural Drawings
results.reason: Excellent technical teaching on blueprint reading, though slightly more specialized than a general construction overview.
summary: Learn what the lines and symbols mean
Understand how to read different building views
Find out how to measure sizes on paper
Gain confidence reading a basic house plan

results.title: How To Get Started In CONSTRUCTION Without EXPERIENCE [AND BE SUCCESSFUL]
results.reason: Focuses more on career entry and business advice than the physical mechanics of building or African regional techniques.
summary: Find out how to get your first job
Learn the best ways to learn on site
Discover how to grow your career quickly
Get tips on working well with a team

results.title: #Scoreboard: How China is helping Africa solve its housing crisis
results.reason: Provides good regional context on African housing and Chinese involvement, but functions more as a news report than a 'how-to' guide.
summary: See how new technology builds homes faster
Learn about partnerships between different countries
Understand how more people get affordable housing
Discover how big projects create local jobs
